title: Slowcraft Data-Driven SlowTool
description: Defines a data-driven SlowTool loaded from data/<namespace>/slowcraft/slow_tool/<path>.json

display.description: The item rendered beneath Slowcraft's progressive-crafting overlay.

outputs.description: Items given to the player when crafting finishes.

name.description: Optional item display name. May be a literal or translated Minecraft text component.

exclude_from_creative.description: When true, this Slowtool is omitted from Slowcraft's creative tab. Defaults to false.

show_overlay.description: When false, Slowcraft's progressive-crafting overlay is not rendered over the item's display texture.

resource_location.description: A Minecraft resource identifier such as minecraft:string.

item_stack_template.description: An item ID or an item-stack template with an optional count and component patch.

count.description: Stack count. Defaults to 1 if not provided.

components.description: Optional Minecraft data-component patch applied to the stack.
